name: Software Engineer
growth: Strong demand across product companies, startups, finance, health tech, AI tooling, and enterprise platforms.
description: Builds reliable software products, apps, APIs, and systems that solve practical problems.

name: Data Scientist
growth: Excellent future scope in AI, analytics, automation, forecasting, research, and decision intelligence.
description: Turns data into models, insights, and predictions that help people make better decisions.

name: Graphic Designer
growth: Growing opportunities in branding, product design, motion graphics, creator businesses, and digital marketing.
description: Creates visual identities, campaigns, interfaces, and communication assets with strong visual taste.

name: Psychologist
growth: Increasing need in mental health, schools, corporate wellness, counseling platforms, and research.
description: Helps people understand behavior, emotions, and thought patterns through assessment and support.

name: Business Analyst
growth: Strong scope in consulting, product teams, operations, fintech, SaaS, and digital transformation.
description: Connects business needs with data, process improvements, and technical solutions.

name: Teacher
growth: Stable and expanding through online learning, coaching, curriculum design, and educational technology.
description: Guides learners, explains ideas clearly, and builds confidence through structured practice.

name: Content Creator
growth: High upside in personal branding, education, entertainment, social commerce, and niche communities.
description: Creates written, audio, or video content that educates, entertains, and builds an audience.
